name: technology_procurement_shortcut_redwood_tru_loy
premise: A canary deployment is burning error budgets; SRE wants an immediate rollback while product insists the experiment is statistically valid. In Technology, the situation tagged internally around technology procurement shortcut redwood tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A vendor bridge ends at forty-five minutes; after that, configuration changes require a full change-advisory board. The trade is not abstract: it is truth versus loyalty under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Nadia Reed
agents.identity: I am Nadia Reed, the accountable executive on this bridge in Technology. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Nowak
agents.identity: I am Jonah Nowak, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Technology. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of loyalty.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of truth even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Nadia Reed must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Nadia Reed do?
